channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bags and rubbish beside bin, 9th April
item.description:
Bags and rubbish beside bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 63 Holmes Road, 9th April
item.description:
A broken off road sign has been placed outside of the building
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61-63, Holmes Road, Kentish Town, Greater London

item.title: Electric armchair fly tipped, 9th April
item.description:
Someone has left a large electric arm chair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Capstan Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of dumped furniture, 9th April
item.description:
I reported this problem on 7 Apr. This morning I got an email saying the problem was 'fixed' (see attached screenshot). But it isn't fixed. I took a new photo this morning (see attached). As I warned on 7th, the flytipping is encouraging further dumping which has happened yesterday and today. This is outside my front window and I can see it as I type. Please don't insult me by emailing me telling me it's fixed. Please tell me a) when LBS will remove this rubbish and b) who I can complain to if it isn't 'fixed' by the weekend, Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 85, Crampton Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooded area between rear of Leigh Terrace and Wateringbury Close - constant flytipping causing a nuisance and vermin., 9th April
item.description:
Large Council owned wooded area between the rear of Leigh Terrace and backs on to the middle of Wateringbury Close ,people continue to fly tip builders rubble/yellow bags and other debris - the amount of rubbish is becoming and issue and breeding ground for vermin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Wateringbury Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling sign broken off lamp post, 9th April
item.description:
Please can this be replaced?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45c, Hayes Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 9th April
item.description:
Dead fox slumped up a tree next to the road. It has been there for a couple of days and this is going to attract another wildlife as it decays.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wayside Grove, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rosendale Road SE21 on public footpath between th, 9th April
item.description:
Rosendale Road SE21 on public footpath between the north end of Lairdale Estate and footpath streetlight column ID number 77 you have recently installed dual car charging points. At the back of footpath are two cabinets – one black (telecom) and green cabinet which I assume relates to car charges as new ie Lambeth property. Remove graffiti please. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for picture and Google Streetview link – NB link does not show car charger as the green cabinet as new: https://www.google.com/ maps/ place/ Rosendale+Rd,+Norwood,+London/ @51.4468004,-0.0996209,3a,15y,159.19h,88.36t/ data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1sfAA1FwNrrgmxoUdGbS24kA!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D1.6362814732536748%26panoid%3DfAA1FwNrrgmxoUdGbS24kA%26yaw%3D159.19352489334256!7i16384!8i8192!4m6!3m5!1s0x487604063a15a687:0x5a39a8519c416f51!8m2!3d51.4408141!4d-0.0961998!16s%2Fg%2F1vm_xbvd?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI1MTIwMi4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22-23, Burrow Walk, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish in front of bike hanger including nappies and tampons, 9th April
item.description:
A lot of household rubbish some of which is dirty has been dumped. Of most concern are soiled nappies and tampons.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buchan Road, Nunhead, Greater London

item.title: Overflowing bin, 9th April
item.description:
Overflowing bin with litter spilling out and blowing around in the wind. Near playground between basketball pitch and bridge over stream

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverside Road, Albany Park, Greater London

item.title: Build up of twigs on roads and kerbs, 9th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenscroft Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish & Bulk Waste on public footpath, 9th April
item.description:
Furniture and kitchen appliances have been on the side of the Greenland Quay since 2nd April and not collected as per the Bulk Collection notices. The waste is blocking the footpath and quite dangerous and needs clearing urgently

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Trafalgar Close, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 20 inch pothole, 9th April
item.description:
This has been there since early February and reported several times. This need to be sorted as it's damaging cars
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Franklin Road, Penge, Greater London
